calendar.matters:
ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Mar-02-2006 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Quynh Tran appearing for the petitioner. Court questioned the filing fee of $1,071.00. Counsel explained that the filing fee includes services for filing. Court wants a supplemental declaration with receipts to support the fees. Matter will be taken under submissiion when the supplemental declaration is filed. Extraordinary fees issue addressed. Counsel will file the supplemental declaration tomorrow. Judge: John Dearman. Reporter: Katy Bersamin, CSR 11722. Clerk: Ella Yip.
